_setup: 1. Go to api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From scratch 2. Name it 'Claude Code' and pick your workspace 3. Go to OAuth & Permissions → Add these Bot Token Scopes: channels:read, channels:history, chat:write, users:read, groups:read, groups:history, im:read, im:history 4. Click 'Install to Workspace' and authorize 5. Copy the Bot User OAuth Token (starts with xoxb-) 6. Invite the bot to channels you want it to access: /invite @Claude Code
_examples: List all channels in the workspace
Search Slack for messages about ad performance
